task_objective: Land the lunar module between the flags with centered position, low speed, upright orientation, minimal fuel use, and stable ground contact.

component_blueprint.name: r_center
component_blueprint.purpose: reward being horizontally close to pad center

component_blueprint.name: r_landing_success
component_blueprint.purpose: large sparse reward for safe upright landing with both legs on ground

anti_exploit_principles: dense guidance is capped and always less than the terminal success bonus to avoid hover-and-collect
both legs must be in contact to trigger terminal success, preventing one-legged exploits
control cost directly opposes unnecessary engine usage
